creator: adrian@ubergeeks.com
text:
On Mon, 25 May 1998, Brett Taylor wrote:

> > 	Probably rename one of the targets.  I vote for renaming the teTeX
> > 	version of mp, since I had never heard of it before.  Perhaps it
> > 	could have its name expanded to 'metapost'.
> 
> I suggested this too, but it's probably not a good idea for us to go
> changing the distributed filenames...  Probably best to just do this
> yourself.  (or use enscript)

	Ok, how about this then.  If you are installing one port/package
and the other is already installed, you are given a warning and a
suggested manual resolution.  While it didn't take me too long to sport
this, it could easily stump a less experienced user. 

	Adrian
--
adrian@virginia.edu        ---->>>>| If I were stranded on a desert island, and
System Administrator         --->>>| I could only have one OS for my computer,
Neurosurgical Visualization Lab ->>| it would be FreeBSD.  Think about it.....
http://www.nvl.virginia.edu/     ->|      http://www.freebsd.org/
